channel.title: AI News — A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Daily AI news digest — curated headlines, summaries and trends

item.title: Palantir posts mini-manifesto denouncing inclusivity and ‘regressive’ cultures
item.description: Palantir has released a statement criticizing inclusivity and what it calls 'regressive' cultures, highlighting its controversial partnerships and ideological stance. This scrutiny comes as the company positions itself as a defender of Western values.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Uber enters its assetmaxxing era
item.description: Uber is entering a new phase focused on maximizing assets and integrating AI into its operations, signaling a shift in its business strategy. This move reflects broader trends in the transportation sector towards efficiency and innovation.

item.title: I stopped using my iPhone's hotspot after testing this 5G router - and that won't change
item.description: The Acer Connect M6E mobile hotspot offers high-speed internet without draining the user's phone battery, providing a viable alternative to using a smartphone's hotspot feature. Users are encouraged to consider its benefits for connectivity.

item.title: How I share audio from my Android phone to multiple earbuds (and why it's a big deal)
item.description: Android's audio sharing feature allows two users to listen to audio through separate earbuds, enhancing the device's usability for shared experiences. This capability is significant for social interactions and media consumption.

item.title: Real-World Clinical Outcomes of Ivermectin and Mebendazole in Cancer Patients: Results from a Prospective Observational Cohort (medical study)
item.description: A viral study involving 197 cancer patients reported a high percentage of clinical benefits from a combined ivermectin and mebendazole treatment. The findings have sparked significant discussion on social media regarding alternative cancer therapies.

item.title: What AI doesn’t know, and why it matters
item.description: An article discusses the limitations of AI, emphasizing that despite its advancements, it remains a tool created by humans to enhance life. This perspective encourages a critical view of AI's capabilities and its role in society.

item.title: Show HN: DOMPrompter – click a DOM element, get a structured AI coding prompt
item.description: DOMPrompter is a new macOS tool designed to simplify AI coding by allowing users to click on a DOM element to generate structured prompts. This tool aims to streamline the coding process for developers working with AI interfaces.

item.title: Trump, When Asked About White House Meeting with Anthropic’s Dario Amodei: ‘Who?’
item.description: Former President Trump appeared unaware of Anthropic's CEO Dario Amodei during a discussion about AI, reflecting the complexities of political engagement with tech leaders. This moment underscores the challenges in the relationship between tech and politics.

item.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang loses his cool — here’s what sparked it
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang expressed frustration over the challenges of selling AI chips to China, emphasizing the need for continuous innovation to maintain a competitive edge. His comments reveal the pressures facing tech companies in a global market.

item.title: Ring-a-Ding Launches OpenClaw Skill for AI Agent Phone Calls
item.description: Ring-a-Ding has launched OpenClaw, a CLI tool that enables AI agents to make outbound calls and provide transcripts without needing extensive telephony infrastructure. This innovation simplifies the integration of AI in communication tasks.

item.title: puvinoise-sdk 0.3.14
item.description: The release of puvinoise-sdk 0.3.14 introduces an independent OpenTelemetry SDK designed for AI agents, enhancing monitoring and observability. This development is significant for improving the performance and reliability of AI systems.

item.title: Willy Rodriguez – In the Unknown (I Will Find You) (2026)
item.description: Willy Rodriguez's second album, 'In the Unknown (I Will Find You)', explores themes of loss and spiritual connection through personal narratives. The album features contributions from tenor saxophonist Ingrid Laubrock, adding depth to its emotional journey.

item.title: gemiterm 1.1.8
item.description: The gemiterm 1.1.8 release is a Python CLI tool that facilitates Google authentication using Playwright with the gemini-webapi library. This tool streamlines the process for developers working with these technologies.

item.title: qor-logic 0.21.0
item.description: QorLogic 0.21.0 introduces governance skills for Claude Code and future AI coding hosts, enhancing the management capabilities of AI systems. This update is crucial for ensuring responsible AI development and deployment.

item.title: Graphs That Explain the State of AI in 2026
item.description: A report highlights that AI investment is surging, while its effects on jobs and public perception remain mixed. This duality underscores the complexities of AI's integration into society and the economy.

item.title: purple-gold-gourd added to PyPI
item.description: The Purple-Gold Gourd package has been added to PyPI, designed to absorb a creator's public voice and transform it into a chat persona. This tool aims to enhance user interaction in AI-driven applications.

item.title: Man Who Threw Molotov Cocktail at OpenAI CEO's Home Referenced Luigi Mangione
item.description: A Texas man, Daniel Moreno-Gama, has been charged with firebombing OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home, allegedly referencing a separate violent incident. This event raises concerns about safety and the potential backlash against AI leaders.

item.title: Rail: A self-hosting language that speaks TLS alone
item.description: Rail is a self-hosting systems language that operates solely on TLS, featuring no C dependencies and a garbage collector in ARM64 assembly. This language aims to enhance security and efficiency in system-level programming.

item.title: Should you wait for the Motorola Razr 2026? Well, it's complicated...
item.description: The upcoming Motorola Razr 2026 series is generating buzz, but experts suggest potential buyers consider whether the features justify the wait. This analysis reflects ongoing consumer interest in foldable technology.

item.title: UFC Fight Night, Gilbert Burns vs. Mike Malott: Start time, where to watch live on Paramount+
item.description: UFC Fight Night features a welterweight bout between Gilbert Burns and Mike Malott, set to take place at Meta APEX in Las Vegas. This event highlights the ongoing popularity of mixed martial arts.

item.title: Gucci Is Going After Ray-Ban Meta, With Google’s Help
item.description: Gucci is collaborating with Google to develop AI smart glasses powered by Android XR, aiming to compete with Ray-Ban Meta. This partnership highlights the intersection of luxury fashion and advanced technology.

item.title: There’s a helpful translation tool hidden in your iPhone Messages
item.description: A hidden translation tool in iPhone Messages allows users to translate languages while texting, enhancing communication for multilingual users. This feature promotes language learning and accessibility.

item.title: SWOT Analysis Templates For A Data-Driven Financial Marketing Strategy
item.description: The article discusses the importance of tailored SWOT analysis templates for banks and fintechs to improve their financial marketing strategies. Generic frameworks are deemed insufficient for navigating competitive shifts.

item.title: longtrainer 1.2.2
item.description: The longtrainer 1.2.2 framework is introduced as a production-ready RAG solution built on LangChain, featuring multi-tenant chatbots and advanced functionalities like streaming and vector search.

item.title: deepbach-pytorch 0.4.3
item.description: DeepBach-pytorch 0.4.3 offers an implementation for musical harmonization, showcasing advancements in AI-driven music composition. This tool can aid musicians and developers in creating harmonized music.

item.title: vit-pytorch 1.20.1
item.description: Vit-pytorch 1.20.1 introduces the Vision Transformer (ViT) model for image processing tasks, enhancing the toolkit available for AI developers working with visual data.

item.title: sugra-api-mcp 0.3.3
item.description: The sugra-api-mcp 0.3.3 serves as a connector for LLM agents to access a wide array of world data, integrating over 518 endpoints from various sectors. This tool supports multiple AI models, enhancing data accessibility.

item.title: sugra-api-mcp 0.3.2
item.description: The sugra-api-mcp 0.3.2 is a similar connector as the previous version, aggregating data from over 55 primary sources for LLM agents. This version continues to enhance data integration for AI models.

item.title: gemiterm 1.1.7
item.description: Gemiterm 1.1.7 is a Python CLI tool that facilitates Google authentication for the gemini-webapi library, streamlining access for developers working with this API.

item.title: sugra-api-mcp 0.3.1
item.description: The sugra-api-mcp 0.3.1 is yet another version of the connector for LLM agents, providing similar functionalities as its predecessors, with a focus on data aggregation from various sectors.

item.title: deepbach-pytorch 0.4.2
item.description: DeepBach has released version 0.4.2, enhancing its implementation for music harmonization using PyTorch. This update aims to improve the tool's functionality for music composition.

item.title: datatia 0.4.6
item.description: Datatia 0.4.6 has been launched as a utility library designed for creating PyTorch dataset classes with a declarative approach. This aims to streamline dataset management for developers.

item.title: US Justice Department refuses to assist French probe into Musk's X: Report
item.description: The US Justice Department has declined to assist French authorities in their investigation of Elon Musk's social media platform X, citing concerns about the probe's legitimacy. This decision highlights the complexities of international legal cooperation in tech-related investigations.

item.title: DOJ refuses to help French authorities in criminal probe of X
item.description: The US Department of Justice has officially refused to aid in the French criminal investigation of X, owned by Elon Musk. This stance underscores the DOJ's support for the platform amid scrutiny.

item.title: A comet gets destroyed by the sun, data centers endanger the Potomac River, and more science news
item.description: Recent science news includes the destruction of a comet by the sun and concerns about data centers impacting the Potomac River. Additionally, a new PBS documentary explores the Artemis program and its astronauts' experiences.

item.title: vit-pytorch 1.20.0
item.description: Vit-PyTorch version 1.20.0 has been released, providing an implementation of the Vision Transformer model for PyTorch users. This update is significant for those working in computer vision.

item.title: sugra-api-mcp 0.3.0
item.description: Sugra-api-mcp 0.3.0 has been launched, serving as a connector for LLM agents to access over 518 endpoints from various data sources, including financial and news data. This tool enhances the capabilities of AI models in real-world applications.

item.title: Democrats Warned Not to Upset Multi-Million Dollar AI Lobbyists, Even Though It’d Be a Slam Dunk With Voters
item.description: Democrats are being cautioned against upsetting influential AI lobbyists, despite potential voter support for regulatory measures. This reflects the tension between political interests and public sentiment on AI regulation.

item.title: vox-voxtral 0.2.27
item.description: Vox-Voxtral version 0.2.27 has been released, providing a speech-to-text and text-to-speech adapter for Vox. This update aims to enhance voice interaction capabilities.

item.title: Sexistential (评论: Sexistential)
item.description: The article discusses the music project 'Sexistential,' highlighting its unique approach to pop music. It emphasizes the artist's ability to redefine the genre with relatable lyrics and melodies.

item.title: Nvidia RTX 3060 comeback in 2026 could alleviate soaring GPU prices and memory shortages — rumored RTX 5050 9GB abruptly shelved amid speculation
item.description: Nvidia's potential re-release of the RTX 3060 in 2026 could help lower GPU prices and address memory shortages in the market. This comes amid speculation that the RTX 5050 has been shelved.

item.title: llm-cookie-bridge 0.1.0
item.description: The release of llm-cookie-bridge 0.1.0 provides a unified async cookie and session management solution for major AI web applications. This aims to streamline user experience across platforms.

item.title: llm-cookie-bridge added to PyPI
item.description: The llm-cookie-bridge has been added to PyPI, offering a unified solution for cookie and session management in AI web apps. This addition aims to improve integration across various platforms.

item.title: vox-voxtral 0.2.26
item.description: The release of vox-voxtral 0.2.26 introduces a new STT/TTS adapter for Vox, enhancing voice processing capabilities. This update is aimed at improving speech recognition and synthesis.

item.title: AWS と NVIDIA によるフィジカル AI の加速: シミュレーションと実世界での学習による本番環境向けアプリケーションの構築
item.description: A new collaboration between AWS and NVIDIA aims to accelerate physical AI through simulations and real-world learning, focusing on building applications for production environments. This initiative is set to enhance AI capabilities significantly.

item.title: Respect to the Man Chasing AI Immortality, While Freeloading Off Our Platform
item.description: A technical postmortem details how an individual with no coding experience created a self-evolving AI swarm across multiple platforms at no cost. This showcases the potential of accessible AI development.

item.title: Show HN: PushToPost – Automate social posts and SEO changelogs from Git pushes
item.description: PushToPost is a new tool that automates social media posts and SEO changelogs from GitHub pushes, aiming to simplify the shipping process for developers. It uses webhooks to analyze changes and generate content.

item.title: Show HN: GAI, A flexible and idiomatic GO Agent framework
item.description: GAI is a flexible Go library designed for building agent-style applications on top of large language models (LLMs). This framework aims to simplify the development of AI-driven applications.

item.title: Show HN: Rapid-MLX – Run local LLMs on Mac, 2-3x faster than alternatives
item.description: Rapid-MLX is touted as the fastest local AI engine for Apple Silicon, offering significant performance improvements over competitors. It features a range of tools and optimizations for efficient AI processing.

item.title: ANET, FN, CIEN: Why These 3 Data Center Stocks Are Top Buys This Earnings Season
item.description: Data center stocks ANET, FN, and CIEN are highlighted as top buys this earnings season due to increasing demand for data center components. This trend is driven by strengthening pricing and infrastructure scaling.
